title: Kerfuffle Bay 1st Birthday Party
excerpt: Celebrate today in Koh Rong with the Kerfuffle Bay 1st Birthday Party.
body: Join us today at Kerfuffle Bay for the 1st Birthday Party celebration in Koh Rong. Expect great vibes, music, and a fun community atmosphere at one of the island's most memorable event spots.

title: Cocktail & Beer Happy Hour: Buy 1 Get 1 Free
excerpt: Join us in Koh Rong for a beach happy hour with Buy 1 Get 1 Free cocktails and beers.
body: Join us in Koh Rong for a special Happy Hour with Buy 1 Get 1 Free cocktails and beers. Relax by the beach, enjoy sunset vibes, and start your evening with great drinks.

title: Welcome to Koh Rong: What to See First
excerpt: A quick guide for new visitors: beaches, sunset spots, and practical tips.
body: Start with Long Set Beach for calm waters, then explore local food near the main pier. In the evening, join a sunset boat or beach dinner. Plan transfers in advance during high season.

title: Golden Sun Villa Seasonal Offer
excerpt: Special package for group bookings this month.
body: Golden Sun Villa now offers discounted rates for longer stays and group bookings. Contact us to receive your custom quote and airport-to-island transfer options.
